promptTemplate: {{palette_mood}} layered polygon grid, {{grid_density}} density, {{cell_shape}} cells in {{chaos_order}} arrangement with {{trail_effect}} echo and {{post_process}}

tags.label: Layered Echo — Synthograsizer Template
tags.description: Dual-palette polygon grid with 30 art-movement palettes across 6 mood groups. Each run blends two random palettes from the selected mood. 4 polygon modes (standard, wonky, diagonal, staggered) assigned per-column by chaos/order ratio. Points animate via dual sine-wave + Perlin noise force, pulling toward neighbor averages. Global breathing scale (±2% sin pulse). Trailing alpha background creates layered echo effect. Optional wireframe cells (15% chance) and glitch scanline overlay. Drop shadows, complementary color splits (33% cells), palette-driven border and background.
